creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-07-13 22:14:58 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/rubygem-simple-rss Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Simple RSS is a simple, flexible, extensible, and liberal RSS and Atom reader
  for Ruby. It is designed to be backwards compatible with the standard RSS
  parser, but will never do RSS generation.
  
  WWW:    http://rubyforge.org/projects/simple-rss/
  
  PR:             ports/136717
  Submitted by:   TERAMOTO Masahiro <markun at onohara.to>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2398    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/www/rubygem-simple-rss/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/rubygem-simple-rss/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/rubygem-simple-rss/pkg-descr (new)
